bookCandidatePicker.title.description: Sheet header asking the user to identify which book was scanned

bookCandidatePicker.cancel.description: Button label to dismiss the book picker sheet without selecting

bookCandidatePicker.closePicker.description: Accessibility label for the dismiss button on the picker sheet

bookCandidatePicker.selectBook.description: Accessibility label for a book candidate card. {{title}} and {{author}} are dynamic.

bookCandidatePicker.addToWishlistHint.description: Accessibility hint explaining that tapping a book card adds it to the wishlist

bookCandidatePicker.alreadyOwned.description: Badge label shown on book cards already in the user's library

bookCandidatePicker.noneOfThese.description: Button label at the bottom of the picker to dismiss without selecting any book

bookCandidatePicker.noneOfTheseA11y.description: Accessibility label for the none-of-these button

themeToggle.toDark.description: Accessibility label for the theme toggle button when currently in light mode

themeToggle.toLight.description: Accessibility label for the theme toggle button when currently in dark mode
